disclaimer: Drop rates in Black Desert Online are almost never published by Pearl Abyss. All percentages below are community estimates compiled from fan sites, wikis, forum threads, and patch notes, and may be outdated or wrong. Entries marked 'official' reflect published patch-note mechanics (quantities/exchanges), not published probabilities. Use at your own risk.

signature_drops.est_chance: ~0.3% to ~4% (tiered by damage contribution: ~4% top 20, ~1% top 50, ~0.3% top 70)
signature_drops.note: Boss main-hand weapon; flat ~1% per looting player is the commonly repeated rumor. Nightmarish Kzarka can drop up to TET versions.

signature_drops.est_chance: 1-2 per kill (~50% chance for top contributors)
signature_drops.note: Exchange 100 for a Kzarka Sealed Weapon Box via quest (exchange mechanic is official).

notable_drops.note: Common filler currency; exchangeable for boss gear boxes over time.
Nightmarish variant has higher gold bar rewards.

notable_drops.item: Mark of Shadow / Shrine Guardian Token
Ancient Magic Crystals / Magic Crystal of Infinity

signature_drops.est_chance: ~1% (rumored, tiered by damage contribution like Kzarka)
signature_drops.note: Boss sub-weapon, PvE-oriented (extra monster damage). Thundercloud Kutum can drop up to TET versions.
Exchange 100 for a Kutum Sealed Sub-weapon Box via quest (exchange mechanic is official).

notable_drops.note: Higher-value gold bars from Thundercloud Kutum variant.

signature_drops.est_chance: ~1% (rumored, tiered by damage contribution like Kzarka)
signature_drops.note: Boss sub-weapon, PvP/AP-oriented. Bloodstorm Nouver can drop up to TET versions.
Exchange 100 for a Nouver Sealed Sub-weapon Box via quest (exchange mechanic is official).

notable_drops.note: Higher-value gold bars from Bloodstorm Nouver variant.

signature_drops.note: Boss awakening weapon (requires level 56+). No published rate; community applies the same ~0.3-4% contribution-tier model as Kzarka.
Exchange 100 for a Dandelion Weapon Box via quest (exchange mechanic is official).
Drops from Stormbringer Karanda variant only; crystal-slot item granting Critical Hit Damage +3%.
Used to make Fiery Kutum/Nouver (extra crystal slot + stats); worth ~8-9 billion silver. Players report years of kills without one.
Pity system: exchange 10 Bloodstones for a Garmoth's Heart (once per family) via Kukao at Garmoth's Nest. Exchange mechanic is official; drop rate is not.
Exchangeable for the Young Crimson Dragon pet.

notable_drops.note: Garmoth loot is limited to 3 reward claims per week.

signature_drops.item: Offin Tett's Sealed Light Weapon Box
signature_drops.est_chance: unknown (assumed similar to other boss weapon boxes, ~1% rumored)
signature_drops.note: Boss main-hand weapon (pure AP, no accuracy). TET Radiant versions exist from enhanced variants.
Exchange 100 for an Offin Tett's Light Sealed Weapon Box via quest from Dikzipo in Grana; 2 fragments also exchangeable for Concentrated Offin Tett Crystal via Jetina weeklies (mechanics official).
Best-in-slot alchemy stone (All AP +8, Accuracy +10, Attack/Cast Speed +5%); worth 9+ billion silver. Can be upgraded to Blessed/Exalted versions with Soul Fragments.
Combine with 1,500 Alchemy Stone Shards via Simple Alchemy to craft Vell's Heart (mechanic official).
Loot delivered as a bundle to the Black Spirit's Safe; Advanced bundle guarantees Caphras Stones, Ancient Spirit Dust, Vell's Fine Powder, Coral Pieces.

notable_drops.item: Gold Bars / Hunter's Seals / Black Stones

signature_drops.est_chance: extremely low; weekly, weighted to top 10 contributors
signature_drops.note: Headline jackpot item shared across all four Morning Light world bosses.
Boss-specific accessory drop (Uturi and Golden Pig King drop the belt).

notable_drops.note: Lesser version of Flame of the Primordial.
Crystal drop unique to Morning Light bosses.

notable_drops.item: Reforge Stone (AP / Accuracy / Evasion / attack damage variants)
notable_drops.note: Uturi's Reforge Stone pool is offense/evasion oriented.

notable_drops.item: Faint Dark Hunger Box (2-5 Faint Origin of Dark Hunger)
notable_drops.note: Added Dec 2025 patch for Morning Light world bosses; Faint Origin boosts Devour enhancement chance (used for Kharazad accessories).
High-value filler. Weekly loot: one reward per boss, resets Thursday midnight UTC (official).

signature_drops.note: Exchange 20 for Mark of Shadow or Witch's Earring; exchange 100 for an Ogre Ring (mechanics official). Quint drops far more than Muraka.

notable_drops.note: Community consensus: only Muraka drops the Dim Ogre Ring.
Mutant Enhancers also exchangeable toward contribution EXP.

signature_drops.note: Opens into one of: Shattered Necklace, Ogre Ring, PRI: Ogre Ring, or DUO: Ogre Ring.
Same exchanges as Quint: 20 for Mark of Shadow/Witch's Earring, 100 for Ogre Ring (mechanics official).
